title: Floral Norwegian Rose Petal Custard Tart
description: A floral and romantic dish featuring custard powder, caramelized rose petals, and a chewy texture suitable for dessert or snack.

ingredients.name: 3/4 cup granulated sugar, for caramelizing rose petals

instructions: Mix flour and sugar in a bowl. Add softened butter, mix until crumbly.
Press into the bottom of an unbaked tart shell (pre-made or homemade), filling the crust evenly.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 10 minutes or until edges are golden brown and crust is set.
In a saucepan, mix eggs with cornstarch. Slowly add milk while stirring continuously until thickened; whisk in vanilla extract.
Pour custard mixture into the baked tart shell, making sure to distribute evenly across the top of the crust.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 20 minutes or until custard is set and golden brown on top. Cool completely before refrigerating.
To caramelize rose petals: In a small saucepan, heat sugar over medium heat to melt; remove from heat as soon as it starts bubbling heavily.
Gently press the rose petals into the hot sugar syrup in a bowl until fully coated and slightly caramelized. Set aside to cool while custard cools.
Serve the tart chilled with a sprinkle of caramelized rose petals on top.
